intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/12. 20s at 120%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:20 at 120%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 120% for 20s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 20s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/12. Power: 120-120%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Alternating. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/12. 0:20 at 120%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 120% FTP, Alternating. 20s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/12. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/12. 120% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/12. 0:20 at 120%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 120% FTP, Alternating. 20s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 3/12. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 9 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/12. 120% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into session. 120%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/12. 0:20 at 120%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% complete. Rep 4/12. 120% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23% through. This is your workout. Own it. 120% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/12. 120% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/12. 120% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 0:40 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 0:40 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 40s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 0:40 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 40s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 40s at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 2:00 at 95%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/2. 32% complete. Hold 95% steady. 15 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2/2. 95% for 2:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 2/2.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into session. Seated at 85-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 105% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 2min at 95%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 105% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 44% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 12 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 11 minutes in. 95% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 44% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 44% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 105% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 95% for 2min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 105% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 56% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 9 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 14 minutes in. 95% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 56% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 56% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 16 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% through session. Rep 10/12. You've done 9min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 64% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 16 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 10/12. You've accumulated 9min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% complete. Block 2/2. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% through session. Block 2/2. You've done 10min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% complete. Block 2/2. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 17 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 17 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 2/2.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 105-105% FTP, 70-80 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 5 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 105-105% FTP, 70-80 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 13min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
